title: feuilleea viridis
intro: Feuilleea viridis, also known as the Green Tea Tree or Feuilleea, is a plant native to East Asia that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Feuilleea viridis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Feuilleea viridis typically involve infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using it in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal syrup or tincture.
